sprints.title: AgentForge v4.4 Real Execution Sprint

items.title: Agent Activity Feed
items.description: Real-time log of agent tasks with durations

items.title: Sprint Progress Tracker
items.description: Gantt-style view of current sprint items, completion %

items.title: Real data binding
items.description: Dashboard reads from .agentforge/ files via fetch() with fallback

items.title: Dark/light theme toggle
items.description: User preference persisted in localStorage

items.title: Auto-refresh every 5 seconds
items.description: All sections refresh data without page reload

items.title: Delegation Flow Diagram
items.description: Interactive SVG showing live delegation chains

items.title: Capability Matrix
items.description: Heatmap of agent skills with inheritance arrows

items.title: Cost Analytics Section
items.description: Detailed cost breakdown, historical trends, budget burn rate

items.title: Review Pipeline Kanban
items.description: Visual board: pending→assigned→in_review→responded→resolved→approved

items.title: Autonomy Tier Dashboard
items.description: Per-agent tier with promotion/demotion history timeline

items.title: Memory Knowledge Base Browser
items.description: Search/browse memory entries, filter by agent/category/tags

items.title: REFORGE Activity Panel
items.description: Active proposals, guardrail results, apply/verify/rollback history

items.title: Meeting Schedule Calendar
items.description: Calendar view of meetings with participant lists

items.title: Interactive Org Graph SVG
items.description: Replace static tree with draggable, zoom/pan, click-to-inspect SVG

items.title: Bus Monitor enhancements
items.description: Payload inspection panel, delivery timing metrics, topic subscription map

items.title: Session Timeline Gantt bars
items.description: Gantt bars, context chain visualization, crash/resume indicators

items.title: Flywheel historical trend lines
items.description: Trend lines, component correlation analysis, compound rate graph

items.title: Agent Cards mini charts
items.description: Mini charts per agent: tasks completed, cost, error rate; expandable panels

items.title: Keyboard navigation
items.description: Tab sections, Escape closes modals, / focuses search

items.title: Export section as PNG or JSON
items.description: html2canvas via CDN for PNG, JSON download for data

items.title: Browser notifications for urgent bus events
items.description: Ask permission on load, show notifications for priority events

items.title: Responsive layout
items.description: Desktop, tablet, and mobile breakpoints

items.title: Performance: <2s load, 60fps animations
items.description: Profile and optimize all animations and initial render

successCriteria: All 23 directive items implemented in dashboard/index.html
Dark/light theme toggle works and persists preference
All sections have live simulated data with 5-second refresh
Keyboard navigation: Escape closes modals, / focuses search
Org graph is interactive SVG with zoom/pan
Sprint Progress Tracker shows v4.3 items with realistic completion %
Agent Activity Feed shows simulated real-time agent tasks
auditFindings: Dashboard uses simulated data — not connected to .agentforge/ file system
Missing 10 new sections from v4.3 directive (Activity Feed, Delegation Flow, etc.)
Agent cards have no mini charts
Org graph is static tree, not interactive SVG
Bus monitor lacks payload inspection panel
Session timeline has no Gantt bars
Flywheel gauges have no historical trend lines

learnings: Single-file HTML dashboard scales well to 4000+ lines with sections
Simulated data with 5s refresh gives convincing live feel before real data binding
Interactive SVG org graph requires careful viewport/pan math
Dark/light theme via CSS custom property swap is zero-cost performance
Mini charts in agent cards add significant visual value
Keyboard navigation with tabindex and keydown events works without libraries
